children.label: Children Policy
children.value: Children of all ages are welcome (Type: age_policy; Max Age: 12)

internet.label: Internet
internet.value: Wifi · Included in price · Available in: entire_property

mandatory_fees.label: Resort Fee
mandatory_fees.value: A tourism/city tax of approximately $3.50 per person per night is payable locally. This tax is not included in the room rate.

parking.label: Parking
parking.value: Price: 25 USD; Inclusion: surcharge; Type: on_site; Price Unit: per_day

parking.label: Parking
parking.value: Price: 15 USD; Inclusion: surcharge; Type: public_nearby; Price Unit: per_day

parking.label: Parking
parking.value: Private parking is available on site (reservation needed). Costs $25 per day. Public parking nearby at $15 per day.

pets.label: Pets
pets.value: Pets are allowed on request. Charges may apply - $50 per stay. Only small dogs are permitted (under 10 kg).

special.label: Important
special.value: Government-issued photo ID and a credit card are required at check-in. Special requests are subject to availability upon check-in.
